title: DIMCP EP_32 Guess What Kelly

transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Where the fuck is Kelly's straw?
[00:00:03.16] Roof!
[00:00:04.16] I'm trying to be a good drink carrier.
[00:00:07.16] I don't know where Kelly's fucking McDonald's straw is.
[00:00:12.12] Maybe I fucking lost it.
[00:00:14.56] Trying to be a good drink carrier here.
[00:00:19.84] Yeah.
[00:00:20.84] Check it out.
[00:00:21.84] Extra straws in the bag.
[00:00:23.84] No.
[00:00:24.84] There's it.
[00:00:26.32] What?
[00:00:28.32] There's an emergency here.
[00:00:31.28] We need to go on a straw hunt for a straw for a soda for motherfucking Kelly who allegedly
[00:00:43.24] does not have straws in her house.
[00:00:44.92] I'll check it out.
[00:00:45.92] What the fuck is this?
[00:00:46.92] This is straw.
[00:00:48.76] I found it.
[00:00:49.76] I'm gonna play it for her.
[00:00:54.24] There we go.
[00:00:55.76] One fucking soda and one quarter powder motherfucking takes 30 minutes to...
